expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜板材的尺寸。[Width], [Height],[Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是上板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是后板的材料厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] เป็นความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ส่วนบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] เป็นความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ส่วนหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước của bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Binibilang ang mga sukat ng kahoy para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng itaas, ibaba, at gilid na kahoy, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng likurang kahoy. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘင်နက်အတွက်ဘုတ်သိပ်သည်းဆကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်ဘုတ်၊ အောက်ဘုတ်နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាភាពធំសំប៉ែតសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាតុល្យភាពសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈនៃសំប៉ែតខាងលើ ខាងក្រោម និងខាង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈនៃសំប៉ែតខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຂອງຄອບຂອງຕູ້ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ຄືຂະຫນາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງຄອບສູງ, ຄອບຕ່ຳ ແລະຂົນດ້ານ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງບອດດ້ານຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用の板材のサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height],[Depth] は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は上板、底板、側板の素材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背板の素材の厚さです。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료의 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 뒷면 보드 재료의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los paneles para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de los paneles superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del panel de fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour les panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour le panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार गणना करता है। [Width], [Height],[Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पीछे के बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height],[Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой панели, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
